html:
A Stalagmite is the Underground equivalent of a Boulder. It can be mined using either a Pickaxe, Opulent Pickaxe, or Pick/Axe. Stalagmites drop various minerals when mined.

Both regular and Tall Stalagmites can be found in 3 different states: full, medium, and low. Each type (and state) has a different loot table.

Stalagmite Resources Tall Stalagmite Resources

Full
  • ×3
  • ×1.6 (1 + 60% to get 1 extra)
  • ×1.25 (1 + 25% to get 1 extra)
  • ×0.05
  • ×0.05
Full
  • ×2
  • ×1.6 (1 + 60% to get 1 extra)
  • ×1.25 (1 + 25% to get 1 extra)
  • ×0.05
  • ×0.05

Medium
  • ×2
  • ×1.6 (1 + 60% to get 1 extra)
  • ×0.5
Medium
  • ×2
  • ×1.6 (1 + 60% to get 1 extra)
  • ×0.15

Low
  • ×1
  • ×1.3 (1 + 30% to get 1 extra)
  • ×0.25
Low
  • ×1
  • ×1.3 (1 + 30% to get 1 extra)
  • ×0.15

Mant Hill

Exclusive to:

There is a spetial Stalagmite that appear in Hamlet DLC only in Mant Hill.

Trivia

  • Even though a Stalagmite will appear to be reduced to a lower state as it is mined, it will retain the loot table of its starting state.
  • The fact that tall stalagmites can drop Logs suggests they may be Petrified Trees.

Gallery

  • Stalagmite icons on the Map.
  • A bugged Stalagmite in a Cave.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“Looks like a rock to me.”
–Wilson
“Rocks are boring.”
–Willow
“Is pointy.”
–Wolfgang
“The earth gives up its bounty.”
–Wendy
“ROCKS CONTAINING ROCKS”
–WX-78
“A strange rock formation.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm not too interested in rocks.”
–Woodie
“Rocks. How dull.”
–Maxwell
“Presumably it's formed from ceiling drippings.”
–Wagstaff
“A cave böulder.”
–Wigfrid
“Rocks underground?! Shocking.”
–Webber
“A pretty cool rock.”
–Walani
“I always get you upside down with stalactites...”
–Warly
“Me likes rocks whar I can see'em.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS A ROCK”
–Wilba
“Rock”
–Wormwood
“I'm going to go ahead and guess it's a rock.”
–Wheeler
“Yep, yep. It's a rock.”
–Winona
“It's just a rock.”
–Wortox
“Cave rock.”
–Wurt
“People get stalagmites and stalactites confused, but I know which is which!”
–Walter
“You've seen one rock, you've seen them all.”
–Wanda

Both regular and Tall Stalagmites can be found in 3 different states: full, medium, and low. Each type (and state) has a different loot table.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thạch đá là dạng ngầm tương đương với Tảng đá. Nó có thể được khai thác bằng cách sử dụng Cuốc, Cuốc sang trọng hoặc Cuốc/Rìu. Măng đá rơi ra nhiều khoáng chất khác nhau khi khai thác.
